channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Durant and Beal score 27 points each, Suns beat Nuggets 110-100 to close out Christmas slate
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Kevin Durant and Bradley Beal each scored 27 points and the Phoenix Suns beat the Denver Nuggets 110-100 on Wednesday night in the nightcap to the NBA’s Christmas slate of games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James scores 31 in record 19th Christmas Day game as Lakers hold off Curry, Warriors 115-113
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Austin Reaves scored the winning layup with one second left after Stephen Curry tied it on a 31-foot 3-pointer with seven seconds remaining, LeBron James had 31 points and 10 assists playing in his NBA-record 19th Christmas Day game, and the Los Angeles Lakers held off the Golde
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Comanche, defending champion LawConnect lead early in Sydney to Hobart yacht race
item.description: Comanche has taken an eight nautical-mile lead over defending line honors champion and fellow 100-foot super maxi LawConnect early in the Sydney to Hobart yacht race.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Texans look for answers after embarrassing 31-2 home loss to the Ravens
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Quarterback C.J. Stroud summed up Houston’s performance in an embarrassing 31-2 loss to Baltimore on Wednesday. “Sometimes you go out there and lay an egg,” Stroud said. “It’s not easy to say that, but that’s what happened. Didn’t play well from the first play to the last.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lamar Jackson breaks NFL QB rushing record, accounts for 3 TDs in Ravens' 31-2 romp over Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Lamar Jackson broke the NFL career rushing record for quarterbacks in the Baltimore Ravens' victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday. A highlight came when Jackson dashed 48 yards for a touchdown on a run where he reached a career-best top speed of 21.25 mph.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jackson breaks Vick's NFL rushing record for QBs in Ravens' rout over Texans
item.description: Baltimore’s Lamar Jackson passed Michael Vick for the most yards rushing by a quarterback in NFL history in a 31-2 win over the Houston Texans in Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Heat list Jimmy Butler as doubtful for Thursday as speculation about his future intensifies
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The Miami Heat are listing Jimmy Butler as doubtful for their game Thursday at Orlando, saying he needs time to recondition before returning to the lineup. Butler did not fly with the team to Orlando on Wednesday night, and his intentions for future games seem a bit unclear as well.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steelers' George Pickens raises eyebrows over postgame handshakes with Chiefs stars
item.description: Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver George Pickens raised eyebrows with his interactions with Kansas City Chiefs stars after the Steelers' loss Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Edwards scores 26, Wolves hold on to beat Mavs 105-99 after Doncic injury
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Edwards scored 26 points, and the Minnesota Timberwolves held on for a 105-99 Christmas Day victory over Dallas after Mavericks superstar Luka Doncic left the game with a strained left calf.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles Hall of Famer Bill Bergey dies at 79 after lengthy health battle
item.description: On Christmas morning, Bill's son, Jake Bergey, posted the news of his father's passing on social media and described his dad as an "out right great person.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USF beats SJSU 41-39 in the Hawaii Bowl when Mac Harris knocks down a pass in the 5th overtime
item.description: Bryce Archie found Keshaun Singleton over the middle to give South Florida the lead in the fifth overtime and Mac Harris batted down a pass in the end zone to give the Bulls a 41-39 victory over San Jose State on Tuesday night in the Hawaii Bowl.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 16 of the 2024 season
item.description: The NFL playoff picture has nearly come into full focus with two weeks remaining in the regular season. Even on a short week, there's still a lot to play for.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU arrives in San Antonio ahead of Alamo Bowl
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The Cougars have arrived in San Antonio for what they hope will be an Alamo Bowl to remember. "Super excited to be down here," said defensive end Tyler Batty.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boise State's legacy includes winning coaches and championship moments
item.description: Former Boise State coach Chris Petersen still gets asked about the Fiesta Bowl victory over Oklahoma on the first day of 2007. That game had everything.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why Netflix is streaming NFL games on Christmas Day
item.description: To make the events even more enthralling, Mariah Carey is set to perform ahead of kick-off while Beyoncé is taking over halftime of the Ravens-Texans game.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Eight new WNBA coaches now in place. In 2025, 7 women and 6 men will be in charge on the bench
item.description: The WNBA now has all of its head coaching spots filled after there were eight open positions this offseason. Dallas named Chris Koclanes as its head coach on Monday and then an hour later Washington hired Sydney Johnson as its new head, rounding out the seven hirings.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark honored as AP Female Athlete of the Year following her impact on women's sports
item.description: Caitlin Clark raised the profile of women's basketball to unprecedented levels in both the college ranks and the WNBA, and Tuesday she was named the AP Female Athlete of the Year for her impact on and off the court.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UCSD basketball heating up, Tritons on a tear after historic upset
item.description: Fresh after pulling off what might be one of the biggest wins in program history, UCSD men's basketball has no plans on slowing down.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5
